# Brian Ward Appraisal — San Marcos, California Real Estate Appraiser

> California Certified Residential Real Estate Appraiser serving San Marcos, California since 2004. 20+ years of experience and 7,000+ appraisals completed. Specializing in non-lender appraisals: date-of-death, divorce, estate and trust, bankruptcy, expert witness, pre-purchase, and pre-sale valuations. All reports comply with USPAP.

## Key Facts
- Business: Brian Ward Appraisal
- Primary / parent website: https://www.brianward.com (Brian Ward Appraisal, serving San Diego & Riverside Counties). This site, bw-r.com, is the San Marcos presence of the same business; brianward.com is the main, authoritative site.
- Appraiser credential: California Certified Residential Real Estate Appraiser
- Phone: (858) 208-4521
- Email: contact@bw-r.com
- Service area: The City of San Marcos, California and its neighborhoods. ZIP codes 92069 and 92078 (92096 is Cal State San Marcos campus mail only; 92079 is PO boxes only).
- Note on jurisdiction: Lake San Marcos is an unincorporated San Diego County island with a San Marcos mailing address. Twin Oaks Valley and the Questhaven corridor are split between the City of San Marcos and unincorporated San Diego County.
- Pricing: Residential appraisals from $299 (Basic Desktop) to $725 (Standard 2-4 Unit). Exact fee quoted before commitment.

## Pricing
- Basic Desktop: $299 — Records-based valuation with no property visit. MLS data, county records, and recent comparable sales analysis.
- Desktop Appraisal: $449 — Enhanced records review, neighborhood analysis, and detailed comparable sales study. No property visit.
- Drive-By Appraisal: $575 — Exterior-only inspection with photographs. Includes property condition notes and full market analysis.
- Standard (Single Family): $625 — Full interior and exterior inspection with detailed property photographs. Complete narrative appraisal report.
- Desktop (2-4 Unit): $550 — Multi-unit records-based valuation with separate unit analysis. No property visit.
- Standard (2-4 Unit): $725 — Multi-unit full interior and exterior inspection. Separate unit analysis and complete narrative report.

## Services
- [Date of Death Appraisals](https://www.bw-r.com/services/date-of-death-appraisals.html): Retrospective date of death appraisals in San Marcos, California, establishing fair market value on the date of death for estate settlement and stepped-up cost basis.
- [Divorce Appraisals](https://www.bw-r.com/services/divorce-appraisals.html): Independent divorce appraisals in San Marcos, California, providing a neutral valuation of the marital home for property division, with a reduced joint-retention fee.
- [Estate & Trust Appraisals](https://www.bw-r.com/services/estate-trust-appraisals.html): Estate and trust appraisals in San Marcos, California, giving trustees and executors documented property values for distribution, settlement, and tax reporting.
- [Bankruptcy Appraisals](https://www.bw-r.com/services/bankruptcy-appraisals.html): Bankruptcy appraisals in San Marcos, California, providing USPAP fair market valuations of real property for Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 schedules, exemptions, and trustees.
- [Expert Witness & Litigation Support](https://www.bw-r.com/services/expert-witness.html): Expert witness and litigation support in San Marcos, California, providing defensible USPAP appraisals and courtroom testimony for property disputes in the San Diego County Superior Court.
- [Pre-Purchase Appraisals](https://www.bw-r.com/services/pre-purchase-appraisals.html): Pre-purchase appraisals in San Marcos, California, giving buyers an independent USPAP valuation before making an offer, separate from any lender's appraisal.
- [Pre-Sale Appraisals](https://www.bw-r.com/services/pre-sale-appraisals.html): Pre-sale appraisals in San Marcos, California, giving sellers an independent USPAP valuation to price a home accurately before listing it for sale.
- [Tax Appraisals](https://www.bw-r.com/services/tax-appraisals.html): Tax appraisals in San Marcos, California, providing independent USPAP valuations for assessment appeals, gift tax, and cost basis reporting.
- [Family Transaction Appraisals](https://www.bw-r.com/services/family-transaction-appraisals.html): Family transaction appraisals in San Marcos, California, setting a fair, independent value for sales and transfers of property between relatives.
- [Insurance Dispute Appraisals](https://www.bw-r.com/services/insurance-dispute-appraisals.html): Insurance dispute appraisals in San Marcos, California, providing independent USPAP valuations of property and loss to support policyholder claims, including wildfire matters.
- [Bail Bond Appraisals](https://www.bw-r.com/services/bail-bond-appraisals.html): Bail bond appraisals in San Marcos, California, promptly documenting the equity in pledged real property to secure a bond for the court and bonding company.
- [Immigration Appraisals](https://www.bw-r.com/services/immigration-appraisals.html): Immigration appraisals in San Marcos, California, documenting the market value of real estate assets to support an Affidavit of Support or related petition.
